SEARCH
Package io.github.javainvaders

Class Player.Bullet

java.lang.Object
io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Enclosing class:
Player
public static class Player.Bullet extends Object
A bullet fired by a player ship. Moves upward and dies when it leaves the screen or hits an alien.
Author:
Larissa R. G.; Vinicius S. F.

    int

    Which player shot this (1 or 2) — used for scoring.

  • Constructor Details

    • Bullet

      public Bullet(float x, float y, int owner)
      Creates a bullet at the given position for the given player.
      Parameters:
      x - horizontal center
      y - starting y (usually top of the ship)
      owner - player index who fired

  • Method Details

    • loadConfig

      public static void loadConfig(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.JsonValue config)
      Loads bullet configuration values from the JSON data.
      Parameters:
      config - The JSON section containing bullet settings

    • rect

      public com.badlogic.gdx.math.Rectangle rect()
      Hitbox for collision checks.
      Returns:
      bounding rectangle of this bullet
